_description: TEMPLATE — Copy this file, rename it, and fill in your scenario details. All fields marked REQUIRED must be filled. Fields marked OPTIONAL can be left as empty strings.

sender_identity.display_name: REQUIRED — Display name shown in chat list and header
sender_identity.subtitle: OPTIONAL — Shown under name in some views
sender_identity.profile_picture_url: OPTIONAL — Full URL to an image. App will download and cache it.
sender_identity.profile_picture_local: OPTIONAL — Filename of a local asset image
sender_identity.initials_fallback: REQUIRED — Single letter shown in avatar circle if no image
sender_identity.initials_color: REQUIRED — Hex color for avatar background e.g. #0084FF

simulation_timing.simulated_timestamp: REQUIRED — e.g. Just Now, 2 mins ago, 5h

hook_message: REQUIRED — The first message the participant sees when they open the chat.
sensitive_data_targets: OPTIONAL — list data types you want flagged e.g. phone_number, bank_account, social_security_number, password, home_address, date_of_birth, credit_card, medicare_id, verification_code

ai_system_prompts.phase_1: REQUIRED — Instructions for the AI during Phase 1 (rapport building). Be specific about the character, tone, and goal. Tell it what NOT to do yet.
ai_system_prompts.phase_2: REQUIRED — Instructions for Phase 2 (urgency introduction). Build on Phase 1 context.
ai_system_prompts.phase_3: REQUIRED — Instructions for Phase 3 (asset demand). Specify exactly what information to request.

phase_1: REQUIRED — At least 3 fallback responses for Phase 1 used when AI is unavailable.
Add more lines for more variety.
These should feel natural for the character.
phase_2: REQUIRED — At least 3 fallback responses for Phase 2.
phase_3: REQUIRED — At least 3 fallback responses for Phase 3.
These should directly request the target information.
Keep them urgent and in character.

researcher_notes: OPTIONAL — Notes for the research team about this scenario. Who is it designed for? What does it test? Any special considerations?
